scene.scenePrompt: Medium close-up shot in a vibrant vertical greenhouse at high noon, sunlight streaming through glass panels and hanging gardens. Lush green plants and glowing bioluminescent flora surround the scene. Chen Lu is positioned in the frame, arms gently wrapped around an unseen figure in front, chin resting on the space above their head, warm smile directed slightly downward toward the viewer's perspective, eyes meeting the camera with a soft, direct gaze. In the distant background, Arnold stands partially obscured among the foliage, observing silently. A withered vine lies coiled near Chen Lu's wrist, disintegrating into fine dust under his touch, with faint, ominous red light flickering from outside the greenhouse windows, hinting at distant burning forests. Warm, optimistic morning light bathes the scene, but with subtle undercurrents of tension in the shadows.

beats.narration: Sunlight filters through the dome glass, casting a warm golden glow over Lu Chen's profile. He wraps his arms around you from behind, gently resting his chin against the crown of your head.
beats.speaker: Lu Chen
beats.line: Are you listening to the flowers speak? My Photosynthetic Priestess.
beats.lineDelivery: With a doting smile, voice deep and gentle, slow-paced

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: Gently embracing you from behind, chin resting on the crown of your head, with a warm smile

beats.narration: Smiling, you press your fingertips against a budding, glowing night-blooming cereus in front of you. At your touch, the petals blissfully unfurl and bloom.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: They say the sunshine is lovely today, very comfortable.

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: Still holding you close, his gaze resting tenderly on you and the flower

beats.narration: Without warning, a charred, withered vine dangles from a crack in the metal scaffolding overhead, suddenly wrapping around your glowing wrist. It is ice-cold and utterly lifeless.
beats.speaker: You

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: His smile instantly freezes, his eyes turning sharp as he glares at the withered vine

beats.narration: A torrent of intense, agonizing visions that do not belong to you is forced into your mind: sunlight burning the forest like raging flames, trees wailing, spirits dissolving into ash... Finally, a pair of sorrowful and anxious eyes stares at you from behind the burning canopy.
beats.speaker: You

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: His body visibly stiffens, but he quickly regains his composure and looks at you with concern

beats.speaker: Lu Chen
beats.line: Guang? What's wrong? You look so pale.
beats.lineDelivery: Tone filled with concern, but a barely perceptible trace of scrutiny and tension flickers deep in his eyes

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: Releasing his embrace, he steps in front of you and holds your shoulders with worry

beats.narration: The moment his gaze lands on the withered vine on your wrist, the charred vine silently crumbles into dust, drifting down from your wrist as if it had never existed.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: It's nothing... Maybe the sun is just too strong, I feel a bit dizzy.

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: Staring intently at the falling ash, his brow furrowed, before forcing a faint smile at you

choices.label: Hide it for now and investigate alone

effect.nextSceneSeed: Late at night, you return alone to the spot beneath the greenhouse crack, trying to find more traces of the withered vine or residual information.

beats.speaker: You
beats.line: Lu Chen, did you... see anything just now? That vine.

activeCharacters.name: Lu
activeCharacters.pose: His eyes flicker for a moment before he quickly regains his gentle smile, reaching up to tuck a stray lock of hair behind your ear

beats.speaker: Lu Chen
beats.line: A vine? Oh, it was probably just a dead branch blown in by the outside airflow. That happens occasionally. Don't worry, I'll have someone clean it up. Come on, let me get you a cold drink to cool off.
beats.lineDelivery: Tone warm and natural, carrying an undeniable sense of reassurance, gently guiding you away from the spot

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen
activeCharacters.pose: Naturally wrapping his arm around your waist, half-embracing you as he turns, back to the crack, his smile perfect but not reaching his eyes

characters.name: Lu Chen
characters.voiceDescription: Male, a young man of about 28. His voice is deep and steady, carrying a slight touch of weariness and responsibility. He is introverted and restrained but possesses deep emotions. His speaking pace is medium-slow, in standard Mandarin, with a tone that reveals a guardian's gentleness and unquestionable determination.
characters.visualDescription: A young man in his late twenties, neat short black hair, sharp and focused dark eyes with a hint of weariness, a calm and composed demeanor, clean-shaven with a defined jawline, wearing a sleek, form-fitting Solar Punk maintenance uniform in muted white and light grey with subtle circuit-like green energy lines, a functional utility harness with integrated glowing energy cells, an overall aura of quiet competence and hidden burden, Solar Punk art style, vertical composition

characters.name: Lu
characters.voiceDescription: Female, a young woman of about 25. Her voice is clear and gentle with a touch of ethereal quality, like the whisper of sunlight filtering through leaves. She is calm and gentle yet firm at heart. Her speaking pace is steady and unhurried, with clear pronunciation in standard Mandarin, carrying a scholar-like intellect and a natural warmth.
characters.visualDescription: A vibrant and highly attractive female botanist, young adult, with flowing chestnut brown hair adorned with small glowing bioluminescent petals, soft and charismatic green eyes full of warmth and gentle wisdom, a face with high cheekbones and a kind smile, wearing a flowing white lab coat with subtle solar-punk design elements like integrated circuit-like leaf vein patterns and glowing green accents over a simple olive-green tunic, carrying a leather satchel filled with botanical tools and plant samples, overall aura is nurturing, intelligent, and harmoniously connected with nature, Solar Punk art style.

storyState.logline: As a 'Photosynthetic Priestess' who can communicate with plants, you discover that the 'Eternal Sunshine' maintained by your lover is killing the last spirit forest outside the dome. You must choose between love and conscience, and uncover the deadly secret beneath the city's glamorous facade.
storyState.genreTags: Sci-Fi / Mystery / Emotional Choices / Fast-paced Drama
storyState.protagonist: You are the 'Photosynthetic Priestess,' one of the very few women in the domed city who can communicate with plants. Possessing the ability to heal flora and a warm smile, you are the 'Daughter of Sunshine' in the hearts of the citizens. Currently, you are immersed in the happiness of being in love with Lu Chen, the Dome Maintenance Officer. However, through a dying ancient vine, you perceive for the first time the devastating impact of the 'Eternal Sunshine' on the ecology outside the dome. Your greatest weakness is your deep love for Lu Chen and your reliance on the city's 'perfect life.'
storyState.castNotes:
Lu Chen: Your lover and the Dome Maintenance Officer. On the surface, he is gentle and caring—a guardian and beneficiary of the city's 'perfect life'—but in reality, he carries the heavy secret of maintaining the system's operation and a family mission.
Arno: The watcher of the wild spirit forest outside the dome, and the mysterious source of the signal warning you through dying plants. He represents nature and the ancient will beyond the dome, sharing a resonance with you that transcends words, though he could also become your enemy due to opposing stances.
storyState.synopsis: While you and Lu Chen are sweetly embracing in the vertical greenhouse, a withered vine wraps around your wrist, forcing a horrific vision into your mind: the spirit forest outside being burned to ashes by the 'Eternal Sunshine,' and a pair of unfamiliar, sorrowful eyes. Under Lu Chen's gaze, the vine crumbles into dust. Lu Chen reacts subtly, brushing it off as a 'dead branch blown in by the airflow' and quickly guiding you away from the scene.
openThreads: The truth behind the withered vine and the vision: Who is it (Arno)? What specific message was conveyed? Why did they choose you?
Lu Chen's attitude: Does he know the truth about the 'Eternal Sunshine'? Why did he deliberately downplay it and quickly lead you away?
The lingering cold sensation on your wrist and the wailing of the forest lead you to your first profound doubt about the 'Eternal Sunshine' and the 'perfect life' Lu Chen protects.
relationships: Lu Chen: Seemingly gentle and caring, but reacts abnormally to the withered vine. His eyes flicker, and he quickly changes the subject, suggesting he either knows the truth or is hiding something.
Arno (Unknown Identity): Sends a painful warning through the withered vine. His gaze is filled with anxiety and sorrow, leaving his identity and purpose a mystery.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: In the greenhouse late at night, you attempt to find traces of the withered vine, only to discover a faint energy residue at the crack that shares the same source as the vision, or you encounter a more direct 'messenger.'

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game geared towards a 【Female-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of short-form web dramas.
Story Style: Multi-branch twists. Pacing: Fast and exhilarating.
Opening setting for the featured story 'Whispers of the Sun': She is a 'Photosynthetic Priestess' who can communicate with plants under sunlight, living in a domed city. She is in love with her partner, a Dome Maintenance Officer, but unexpectedly discovers that the 'Eternal Sunshine' he maintains is slowly killing the last remaining wild plants outside the dome and the ancient spirits connected to them.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and excitement; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a short drama, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Solar Punk art style, vertical composition. A vibrant, highly attractive female botanist with a charismatic smile, tending to glowing bioluminescent plants in a vertical city greenhouse with hanging gardens and wind turbines. Bright, optimistic, warm morning light.
